knowledge/telemetry-schema-harness-2026-.description: Harness-specific token telemetry JSON schema and dashboard queries

.agents/skills/harness_editor/SKILL.md.description: Harness Editor skill — manages edits to CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SKILL.md files, knowledge/, Implement/ with mandatory MECE plan gate and full close sequence.
.agents/skills/harness_editor/SKILL.md.summary: Harness Editor manages all edits to core configuration files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, knowledge/, Implement/) using mandatory MECE planning and verifying a five-element behavioral contract after each change.
key_claims: mece_plan.md dated today required before any file edit
File Size Contract enforces maximum line limits per file type
harness_flow and Implement/ documentation must update in same task
[pre-edit] emit mandatory before every Edit tool call

scripts/token_estimator.py.description: Token estimator — SESSION_TOTAL + CHAT_TOTAL formula per R1. Callable via Bash.
scripts/token_estimator.py.summary: Token estimator provides command-line utilities for SESSION_TOTAL and CHAT_TOTAL estimation using measured character multipliers and configurable simulation for planning long sessions.
key_claims: Thai characters multiply at 1.7 tokens per character
English characters multiply at 0.3 tokens per character
supports --simulate flag for multi-turn projection
constants derived from measured Claude app session data

.agents/skills/harness_doctor/SKILL.md.description: Structural fix agent for recurring CFP patterns — diagnose → propose → wait approval → execute. Delegates SKILL.md file edits to harness_editor.
.agents/skills/harness_doctor/SKILL.md.summary: Harness Doctor fixes recurring CFP patterns that reoccurred after a prior fix was applied by reading index_cfp_fix.json, proposing structural changes, and enforcing harness conventions.
key_claims: triggers on recurred_after_fix array non-empty in index
first-time CFP without prior fix attempt refused
structural fixes must follow harness behavioral contract
updates CODING_FAILURE_PATTERNS with fix attempt metadata

CLAUDE.md.description: Master hard constraints — R1–R16, R-Roadmap, Boot gates. Read first by every agent, every session.
CLAUDE.md.summary: CLAUDE.md defines hard constraints and gates for all agents including mandatory boot sequence, token tracking formulas, MECE planning requirements, and phase transition rules.
key_claims: SESSION_TOTAL resets to zero at session start before any work
compact_size equals CHAT_TOTAL pre-compact times 0.52
B1 resets SESSION_TOTAL=0 on fresh session start
Never-Full-Load rule prohibits reading large index files in full
Phase Transition Gate requires gather_complete.md and mece_plan.md today

AGENTS.md.description: Agent orientation — Boot sequence B1-B4, Per-Turn Routing C0-C3, Loop Architecture Phases 1-3.
AGENTS.md.summary: AGENTS.md provides complete agent orientation including boot sequence implementation, per-turn routing logic, three-phase loop architecture (Gather, MECE Plan, Execution), and sub-agent delegation rules.
key_claims: B1 bash resets SESSION_TOTAL=0 and initializes CHAT_TOTAL at boot
sys_fixed computed dynamically as CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md chars times 0.3 plus 3500
compact_size formula uses 0.52 multiplier on pre-compact CHAT_TOTAL
hooks_per_turn equals 700 tokens for harness reminders and tools
per-turn growth formula CHAT_TOTAL += 700 plus turn_tokens times 1.3

.agents/skills/skill-manifest.json.description: Machine-readable skill routing — keyword → skill mapping, on_demand_files, boot_read_policy. Read at Boot B2.
.agents/skills/skill-manifest.json.summary: Skill manifest is machine-readable routing table that agents read at Boot B2 via keyword matching to load skills, and explicitly prohibits auto-loading on_demand_files at B3.
key_claims: on_demand_files used for G2 lookup only never at B3 boot
boot_read_policy specifies which files legal to read at each boot stage
never_at_boot list includes all index_variables and index_files JSON
B3 reads SKILL.md offset 1 limit 80 for sections only

.agents/skills/registry.md.description: Fast-match keyword→skill table + micro-rules. Secondary routing after skill-manifest.json.
.agents/skills/registry.md.summary: Skill Registry provides keyword-to-skill fast-match table and micro-rules for each skill, used after skill-manifest.json keyword matching and before loading full SKILL.md.
key_claims: fast-match keywords route to specific skill names automatically
fix and bug keywords load editor skill with R7 first
hard constraints are always active regardless of loaded skill
learned_routes automatically updated for repeated keyword matches

knowledge/harness_flow_20260526.md.description: Main harness architecture flow diagram — Layer 0-3, Boot, Per-Turn Routing, Phase 1-3, signal glossary, patch history.
knowledge/harness_flow_20260526.md.summary: Harness Complete Flow is the definitive reference documenting post-fix harness architecture, token formula accuracy improvements through T-046, and completion gate behavior.
key_claims: compact_size ratio improved from 0.30 to 0.45 in T-044 fix
hooks_per_turn reduced from 1300 to 700 based on actual measurement
T-046 applies triangular correction factor of 1.3 to per-turn growth
system_fixed computed dynamically instead of hardcoded 7300
T-045 validated accuracy at 1.26x undercount versus API baseline

knowledge/index_variables.json.description: Symbol index — component/function/hook definitions + used_in[] backlinks. Never-full-load: grep only.
knowledge/index_variables.json.summary: Index variables tracks all defined symbols and variables across the codebase with their location, usage count, and related references for refactoring safety checks.
key_claims: stores structured symbol metadata keyed by symbol name
enables safe refactoring by tracking all symbol occurrences
must be updated when any symbol is created or renamed

knowledge/index_cfp_fix.json.description: CFP occurrence + fix tracking index — recurrence count, last_fixed_session, status per CFP-XXX.
knowledge/index_cfp_fix.json.summary: Index CFP fix tracks known coding failure patterns, their fix attempts, recurrence count, and current status to prevent repeating same failures.
key_claims: status field tracks active or resolved failure patterns
recurred_after_fix array counts how many times fix was applied again
harness_doctor uses this index to identify structural issues
each CFP entry maps to corresponding CODING_FAILURE_PATTERNS.md section

knowledge/index_sessions.json.description: Session history index — task summaries, files_changed[], lookup.py --session oracle source.
knowledge/index_sessions.json.summary: Index sessions catalogs all completed sessions with their metadata, keywords, and summaries for session history lookup and context restoration.
key_claims: tracks session status completed or in_progress for each entry
keywords extracted from session content enable full-text search
summary field truncated to aid discovery without re-reading files
files_changed list tracks which source files were modified per session

knowledge/error_index.md.description: ERR-XXX error code registry — symptom, root cause, fix approach, failed approaches per error ID.
knowledge/error_index.md.summary: Error Index catalogs all discovered ERR-XXX bugs with their failed approaches and attempted fixes to prevent repeating debugging work.
key_claims: each entry records bug ID, title, and chronological fix attempts
Failed Approaches section documents what did not work
prevents agent from trying identical debug paths twice
referenced by error protocol R9 before starting new debug

knowledge/topic_registry.json.description: Controlled vocabulary for topic-graph backlink system — 20 closed topics agents must use when assigning topics[] to files
knowledge/topic_registry.json.summary: Topic registry defines closed vocabulary of valid topics that agents must use for tagging files, preventing free-text tags and enabling semantic backlink analysis.
key_claims: closed vocabulary enforced strictly with no free-text tags allowed
agents must assign topics only from official list in this file
topics enable topic overlap computation in backlink_analyzer
version field tracks schema updates to topic definitions

scripts/backlink_analyzer.py.description: Computes topic-graph related[] entries in index_files.json based on pairwise topic overlap (|A∩B|/|A| >= 0.5). Flags: --dry-run, --min-overlap, --show-matrix.
scripts/backlink_analyzer.py.summary: Backlink analyzer computes related array entries in index_files.json by measuring topic overlap between files and categorizing relationship strength.
key_claims: overlap formula divides intersection size by source file topic count
strong relationship threshold set at overlap greater than or equal to 1.0
related relationship threshold set at overlap between 0.5 and 1.0
generates related array of files with semantic overlap

.agents/skills/harness_doctor/SKILL_deta.description: Detailed procedures for harness_doctor sections 1-5: Diagnosis, Audit, Proposal, Approval Gate, Execute+Verify. Includes Python snippets for index_cfp_fix.json operations.
.agents/skills/harness_doctor/SKILL_deta.summary: Harness Doctor detail section provides step-by-step procedures for diagnosing recurring patterns, proposing fixes, and executing structural changes following all harness contracts.
key_claims: Step 1 queries index_cfp_fix to find highest recurrence count
Step 4 appends fix attempt to CODING_FAILURE_PATTERNS metadata
resolution status updated to resolved-pending at completion
session_manager auto-updates status on next session close

.agents/tools/tool-manifest.json.description: Registry of all agent tool scripts: path, tags, run command. Used by B2 skill routing and on_demand_files lookup.
.agents/tools/tool-manifest.json.summary: Tool manifest is registry for Claude Code built-ins and local scripts with tags for keyword matching, enabling choose_tools.py to route to appropriate tools.
key_claims: each tool has type builtin or local with tags for discovery
when field documents usage context for each tool entry
backlink_analyzer tool must run after editing indexed files
tags enable keyword matching for automatic tool selection

scripts/bootstrap_sessions.py.description: Initializes .sessions/ from docs/session_templates/ on first run. Flags: --force (overwrite), --dry-run (list without write). Used in target project setup (Implement/02_setup.md Step 5).
scripts/bootstrap_sessions.py.summary: Bootstrap sessions initializes .sessions/ directory from templates on first clone or fresh environment, skipping existing files unless --force flag provided.
key_claims: copies templates from docs/session_templates into .sessions
skips files that already exist unless --force specified
mece_plan_schema.md template renamed to mece_plan.md on copy
supports --dry-run flag to preview actions without writing

docs/session_templates.description: 8 template files for .sessions/ initialization: active_thread, mece_plan_schema, gather_complete, session_handoff, compact_state, session_tokens, chat_tokens, self_improve_log. Committed to repo so fresh clones have schema reference.
docs/session_templates.summary: Directory containing session file templates used by harness agents. Provides canonical schemas for mece_plan.md and other session state files.
key_claims: mece_plan_schema.md defines mandatory Phase 0-3 block structure
templates enforce consistent session state format across all agents
Phase 0 block required for PreToolUse hook validation to pass

scripts/session_compactor.py.description: Session health gate before git commit/push. Validates .sessions/ has all 8 required files, correct fields, and active_thread.md phase != in_progress. Called by identity/SKILL.md Fatal Constraint. Exit 0=STATUS:OK, Exit 1=STATUS:FAIL.
scripts/session_compactor.py.summary: Session compactor validates .sessions/ health before git commits by checking file presence and phase state, blocking commits when phase is in_progress.
key_claims: exit code zero means safe to commit all checks pass
exit code one means checks failed do not commit
blocks commits when active_thread.md phase equals in_progress
checks for required fields in all session metadata files

.agents/skills/ascii_flow/SKILL_detail.m.description: Detailed reference for ascii_flow: §1 Char Palette (box-drawing chars, arrows, annotations), §2 Box Templates (outer/inner/decision/note), §3 Detail Guidelines, §4 Flow Connector Patterns, §5 Doc Structure, §6 Invoke Rule.
.agents/skills/ascii_flow/SKILL_detail.m.summary: ASCII flow detail provides comprehensive box-drawing character palette, box templates, connector patterns, and document structure for creating harness flow diagrams.
key_claims: outer process box must be 70 characters wide consistently
inner nested box uses 2 space indent and 66 characters width
character set includes all box-drawing connectors and branches
flow sections organized as sequential parallel loop and error branches

REPO_MAP.md.description: Repository structure reference — full file tree with descriptions for all agents
REPO_MAP.md.summary: REPO MAP is reference guide documenting repository structure including root files, directory purposes, and knowledge base paths for agent orientation.
key_claims: CLAUDE.md contains hard constraints R1 through R16 rules
AGENTS.md details boot sequence per-turn routing and loop architecture
INVARIANTS.md loaded on-demand for destructive gates only
Full-Read permitted on REPO_MAP and all SKILL.md files

.agents/skills/session_manager/SKILL.md.description: session_manager skill — session open/close, topic switch, token pause, compact_state write
.agents/skills/session_manager/SKILL.md.summary: Session Manager handles session lifecycle including topic-switch close, TOKEN PAUSE halts, BLOCKED recovery, and manual close with mandatory five-file write sequence.
key_claims: Section 1 checks active_thread.md phase and rotates session JSON
Section 3 Step 0 requires CFP self-improve before writing files
Section 3 must write five mandatory files in session_manager procedure
confirms all files written to user with complete list before closing

Implement/09_migration.md.description: Migration guide for users upgrading from older harness version — 4 tracks: M1 indexes, M2 tree, M3 skills/config, M4 verify
Implement/09_migration.md.summary: Migration guide provides four-track procedure (M1 through M4) for upgrading projects from older harness versions to current version with index reformatting and file structure updates.
key_claims: M1 reformats indexes from old schema missing topics and backlinks
M2 restructures tree to add required directories and session files
M3 overwrites skills and config with preserve list exceptions
M4 verifies migration with 08_checklist.md before rollback option

docs/session_templates/mece_plan_schema..description: Template for .sessions/mece_plan.md — Phase 0-3 blocks, Section Template (Tool/Rollback/Data_Sent/Token), Files Read tables, TOKEN CHECK runtime cmd, [mece-audit] + feedback in Phase 3 Close, PATH A/B/C.
docs/session_templates/mece_plan_schema..summary: MECE plan schema is the mandatory template for writing .sessions/mece_plan.md including Phase 0 through 3 blocks, Verify-N commands, and close path selection.
key_claims: must use exact template format no simplified versions allowed
Phase 0 block keeps X marking across task resume only
Verify-N sections contain runnable shell commands not prose
TOKEN CHECK rule triggers /compact at 50k and TOKEN PAUSE at 60k

Implement/04_skills.md.description: Full skill reference — all 15 SKILL.md contents + MECE Planner plan format + M1.5 Named Outputs (dependency_map/risk_flags) + Verify Pattern Lookup.
Implement/04_skills.md.summary: Implementation guide provides complete bootstrap templates for all ten agent skills with project-specific paths replaced and behavioral contracts documented.
key_claims: agent skill serves as fallback orchestration route re-evaluates intent
each skill section documents Trigger Refusal Workflow Output and Routing
templates copy behavior from main branch SKILL.md files exactly
MECE Constraints Block copied into project mece_plan.md per skill

Implement/08_checklist.md.description: Behavioral contract verification checklist — all harness features with grep-based Verify commands. Includes M1.5 named outputs, mece_plan_schema fields, [mece-audit]+feedback checks.
Implement/08_checklist.md.summary: Post-installation verification checklist validates harness setup completeness across nine sections, blocking on critical failures and warning on non-critical mismatches.
key_claims: FAIL status blocks progression until issue resolved immediately
WARN status logs issue but allows continued progress to next check
three or more FAIL items per run escalates to harness_doctor skill
section 9 verifies session files only after first boot completes

scripts/safe_run.py.description: Priority-first chunked output filter (T-042). THRESHOLD=40, CHUNK=25. Signal lines first, never truncated. Noise lines (non-monotonic) removed. Short output pass-through.
scripts/safe_run.py.summary: Safe run is priority-first chunked output filter that limits token waste by extracting signal lines and truncating non-signal output with threshold configuration.
key_claims: output greater than THRESHOLD lines triggers filtering behavior
signal lines error warn fail exception traceback sent first never truncated
non-signal lines reduced to first CHUNK_SIZE lines plus remainder count
THRESHOLD set to 40 CHUNK_SIZE set to 25 in default configuration

docs/token_benchmark.md.description: Token optimization benchmark — before/after safe_run.py comparison for 3 scenarios. Projects 45-65% reduction for T-041-equivalent tasks.
docs/token_benchmark.md.summary: Token benchmark documents token optimization results from T-042 through T-046 showing 73% waste reduction on git output and 20.5% formula accuracy gap breakdown.
key_claims: Test A git output reduced 100 lines to 27 lines saving 438 tokens
Test B error storm reduced non-monotonic output from 156 to 40 lines
T-044 improved accuracy from 1.49x to 1.26x undercount ratio
remaining 20.5% gap caused by triangular accumulation of history

scripts/knowledge_conflict_checker.py.description: Stage 1 knowledge conflict checker — pure Python, 0 LLM tokens. Computes review_priority_score from topic overlap + phrase matching. Returns structured JSON for agent review.
scripts/knowledge_conflict_checker.py.summary: Knowledge conflict checker detects potential contradictions between files using topic overlap analysis and phrase-level matching, returning verdict for agent review.
key_claims: clean verdict when no related files with overlap greater than minimum
low_priority verdict when related files exist without phrase matches
review_recommended verdict when related files contain matching phrases
exit code zero for clean or low_priority exit code one for review

scripts/write_context_cache.sh.description: Stop hook script — writes compact context snapshot to .sessions/session_context_cache.md and appends 1 JSON line to .sessions/token_log.jsonl every time Claude stops.
scripts/write_context_cache.sh.summary: Stop hook script that writes session_context_cache.md for fast context restore after cache miss and appends per-turn telemetry to token_log.jsonl.
key_claims: Overwrites session_context_cache.md on every Stop event
Appends one JSON line to token_log.jsonl with ts, task, phase, session_total, chat_total, cache counters
Reads active_thread.md and session_tokens.md for current state
Called by .claude/settings.json Stop hook with 10s timeout

scripts/backfill_knowledge_index.py.description: One-time backfill script for knowledge/index_files.json — extracts scaled excerpts (60L cap) and writes agent-generated summary/key_claims. Also auto-detects supersedes chain from _YYYYMMDD.md filename pattern.
scripts/backfill_knowledge_index.py.summary: Backfill knowledge index populates summary and key_claims fields in index_files.json using three-step workflow with no SDK tokens via pure Python extraction.
key_claims: Step 1 extract reads files and auto-detects supersedes chain
Step 2 agent generates summary and key_claims from excerpts
Step 3 write validates key_claims minimum 4 word length requirement
supports --auto-supersedes flag to detect date-based file chains

.sessions/exec_log/.description: Tool result offload dir — full results stored per-turn, pruned by trim_exec_log.py

scripts/trim_exec_log.py.description: Prune .sessions/exec_log/ — max 50 files, max age 24h. Run before /compact.
